## Summary / 摘要

<!-- What does this PR do? / 这个 PR 做了什么？ -->

## Type of change / 变更类型

- [ ] Bug fix / Bug 修复
- [ ] New feature / 新功能
- [ ] New agent.command recipe / 新 agent.command 配方
- [ ] Documentation / 文档
- [ ] Chore (deps, tooling) / 杂项（依赖、工具链）

## Checklist / 检查清单

- [ ] `go test ./...` passes / `go test ./...` 通过
- [ ] `go build ./...` succeeds / `go build ./...` 编译通过
- [ ] New behaviour has tests / 新行为有对应测试
- [ ] `README` updated if config or behaviour changed / 配置或行为变更时已更新 `README`
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` / 已在 `[Unreleased]` 下更新 `CHANGELOG.md`
